primary_function: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Claude should use this skill whenever asked to write some sort of internal communications (status reports, leadership updates, 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, incident reports, project updates, etc.).
suggested_aec_gates: Verify communication type matches one of the supported formats (3P, newsletter, FAQ, status, leadership, incident)
Confirm 3P updates follow strict format: [emoji] [Team Name] (Dates), Progress/Plans/Problems sections with 1-3 sentences each
Ensure company newsletters use 'we' tense and include 20-25 bullet points with appropriate sectioning
Validate tone is matter-of-fact and data-driven with metrics where possible
Confirm content is appropriate for internal audience and avoids external/customer-facing language
Verify communication length is appropriate for format (3P: 30-60 seconds read time, newsletter: consumable in Slack/email)
Ensure proper emoji usage and formatting consistency across communication types
Confirm team name and time period are clearly specified for 3P updates
